response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and some recent AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure, but the role requires an executive CTO with 5+ years senior technical leadership, proven scaling of teams from 10 to 30+, production multi-agent AI systems at scale, and fintech-infrastructure depth (credit, risk, liquidity). Resume shows no people-management, no org-scaling, no production multi-agent systems, and no credit-risk/working-capital experience. Title and scope mismatch is severe.
strengths: Deep backend/distributed-systems background including high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent exposure to agentic AI tooling and MCP code generators at Acme
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source founder experience
concerns: No executive or senior technical leadership track record; no evidence of scaling teams to 30+
No production multi-agent AI systems, LLM evaluation pipelines, or model-agnostic agent architecture experience
No fintech-infrastructure depth in credit risk, working-capital allocation, or regulated financial environments

key_factors.factor: Lack of executive leadership and team scaling
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
